emails.subject_base: Background for Skilling for Call w/Bryson
emails.body: Background for Skilling for Call w/Bryson Folks: My apologies. This is not proofed, but I wanted to make sure that everyone had a chance to review and comment. Apologies for any unintentional omissions and errors. I think it tracks closely with the direction agreed to on the call today. All comments are encouraged and welcome. Best, Jeff
